name: Sloppy Ziti
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef in a pan, then drain off the fat using a sieve.
2. Finely chop the vegetables (carrot, onion, green pepper) in a food processor and add them to the meat in a medium saucepan.
3. Saute the mixture over low heat until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
4. Add chili powder, tomato paste, and water; simmer for about 10 minutes.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Cook the ziti pasta al dente (until cooked but still firm) in boiling water.
7. Drain the ziti and mix it well with the sauce.
Per serving: 409 Calories; 8g Fat (18% calories from fat); 18g Protein; 65g Carbohydrate; 26mg Cholesterol; 159mg Sodium
